puzzleDescription: Create a method that reverses the digits of an integer (e.g., 123 becomes 321).
objective: Complete the 'reverseNum' method. Use a while loop to extract digits and rebuild the number.
hints: The modulo operator 'n % 10' gets the last digit of a number.
To move the current digits to the left, multiply 'reversed' by 10 before adding the new digit.
Dividing 'n /= 10' removes the last digit so you can get the next one in the next loop.
